sentences.arabic: بَدَأْتُ أَحْزِمُ حَقِيبَتِي قَبْلَ السَّفَرِ بِيَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Počeo sam pakirati kofer dan prije putovanja.
sentences.translationEn: I started packing my suitcase a day before the trip.

sentences.translation: Pažljivo sam složio odjeću i lične potrepštine.
sentences.translationEn: I carefully placed clothes and personal items inside.

sentences.arabic: لَا أَنْسَى أَبَدًا أَنْ أَحْمِلَ جَوَازَ سَفَرِي وَبُطَاقَاتِ السَّفَرِ.
sentences.translation: Nikad ne zaboravim ponijeti pasoš i putne dokumente.
sentences.translationEn: I never forget to bring my passport and travel documents.

sentences.arabic: تَأَكَّدْتُ أَنَّ وَزْنَ الْحَقِيبَةِ لَا يَتَجَاوَزُ الْحَدَّ الْمَسْمُوحَ بِهِ.
sentences.translation: Provjerio sam da težina kofera ne prelazi dozvoljenu granicu.
sentences.translationEn: I made sure the suitcase weight did not exceed the allowed limit.

sentences.arabic: ثُمَّ أَغْلَقْتُ الْحَقِيبَةَ وَأَنَا مُسْتَعِدٌّ لِلسَّفَرِ.
sentences.translation: Zatim sam zatvorio kofer i bio spreman za put.
sentences.translationEn: Then I closed the suitcase and was ready to travel.
